title: Spotify Announces April 8 Premiere for Tokyo Billions Club Live Concert Film; Teaser Released
detail: Spotify announces that the full concert film from Bad Bunny's historic first-ever performance in Asia (March 7, Tipstar Dome Chiba, Tokyo) will premiere globally on the platform on April 8. Titled "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film," the 42-minute special is directed by his longtime creative partner Stillz and features performances of 17 hits including "DtMF," "Tití Me Preguntó," "Yonaguni," "NUEVAYoL," and "EoO," as well as a salsa rendition of "MIA." Spotify simultaneously releases a teaser video on social media. The Tokyo show was filmed in front of over 2,300 top Spotify fans in the Asia region, making Bad Bunny the first Latin artist in Spotify's Billions Club Live series to perform in Asia.
